title: schizoloma pumilum
intro: Schizoloma pumilum, also known as Dwarf Osmund Fern or Schizoloma, is a type of fern that belongs to the Schizolomatinae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Schizoloma pumilum include the treatment of respiratory issues, skin problems, and digestive issues, as well as its use as a remedy for fever and rheumatism. Schizoloma pumilum can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to the affected area.
